record.field: ${('' if object.partner_id and object.sudo().partner_id.email and object.sudo().partner_id.email==object.partner_email else object.partner_email|safe)}
${object.partner_id and object.sudo().partner_id.email and object.sudo().partner_id.email==object.partner_email and object.sudo().partner_id.id or False}

field.name: body_html
field.div:
Dear ${object.sudo().partner_id.name or 'Madam/Sir'},
Your request % if object.get_portal_url(): ${object.name} % endif has been received and is being reviewed by our ${object.team_id.name or ''} team. The reference of your ticket is ${object.id}.
To add additional comments, reply to this email.
Thanks you,
${object.team_id.name or 'Helpdesk'} Team I take it".
